data: Revise how to answer mock interview questions about your strengths

message: Let's revise how to talk about your greatest strength in a mock interview.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"My greatest strength is [skill] because [reason]."

This structure helps you present your strength confidently and back it up with a clear reason.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b7442078-39e0-4b6b-aae3-b6c5009a9ee6-Interview---Mock-practice.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b7442078-39e0-4b6b-aae3-b6c5009a9ee6-Interview---Mock-practice.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about your greatest strength

1.My greatest strength is leadership because I can guide teams to achieve goals effectively.
2.I am good at many things and it is hard to pick just one strength.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to explain a strength with a clear reason

1.My greatest strength is creativity because I come up with innovative solutions to complex problems.
2.Creativity is my strength. I am always creative at work and in life.

Correct answer: 1
My&&greatest&&strength is&&analytical&&thinking because&&it&&helps me&&break down&&complex&&problems into&&manageable&&steps.
My&&greatest&&strength is&&empathy because&&it&&helps me&&connect with&&my&&colleagues and&&understand&&their&&needs.
My&&greatest&&strength is&&initiative because&&it&&helps me&&identify&&opportunities and&&take&&action&&without&&waiting to&&be&&asked.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. The interviewer asks about your greatest strength. Share your strength and give a reason.'

'2. The interviewer asks what skill makes you a strong candidate. Share your strength and reason.'

'3. The interviewer asks what you are best at. Name your strength and explain why it helps you at work.'

'4. The interviewer asks what one quality defines you professionally. Share your strength and reason.'

'5. The interviewer asks how you add value to a team. Share your greatest strength and why it matters.'"
